meaning: n.颜色鲜明的运动夹克,宣布者
examples: For his next birthday I bought him another blazer.
And I need my white shirt, my red tie and my blue blazer.
This is why I chose you, Blazer.
If Augusta can handle a Bubba in a green blazer, it can handle the 21st century.
He was dressed in a brown blazer, a black shirt, and a red tie.
